name: nestweaver
description: Scaffold NestJS + multi-frontend monorepos with batteries included

scripts.build: pnpm --filter nestweaver build && pnpm --filter create-nestweaver build && pnpm --filter @nestweaver/loom build
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
